title: psychopsis papilio f. latourae
intro: Psychopsis papilio f. latourae, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a rare and exotic orchid species native to the tropical forests of Central America. Its flowers have a unique shape and color, with a delicate appearance and a sweet fragrance. The Butterfly Orchid has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
